TCA-IRR
    Back to Analysis Setup

    Financial Analysis Configuration

    Configure sub-dimension weights, signal thresholds, and scoring logic for the Financial Analysis module.

    Sub-Dimension Weights
    Weights must sum to 1.0. Current total: 1.00
    30%

    Quality and defensibility of the revenue generation model.

    30%

    CAC, LTV, payback period, and gross margin sustainability.

    20%

    Credibility and achievability of financial forecasts.

    20%

    Clarity and justification of capital needs and milestones.

    Scoring Formula
    financial_score = revenue_model × w₁ + unit_economics × w₂ + projections × w₃ + funding_requirements × w₄
    revenue_model× 0.30
    unit_economics× 0.30
    projections× 0.20
    funding_requirements× 0.20
    Total weight1.00
    Module Settings
    8

    Score ≥ this value → green signal.

    5.5

    Score ≥ this value → yellow. Below → red.

    Signal Definitions
    Green — Score ≥ 8: Strong financial position.
    Yellow — Score ≥ 5.5: Moderate financial health.
    Red — Score < 5.5: Financial concerns present.
